summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Workflow lacks `set -euo pipefail`—grep assertions fail silently, never stopping workflow. Lines 38–50, 63–75, 88–102, 104–110, 112–117, 119–129 all have `grep -q` followed by unconditional `echo`, so a failed grep doesn't halt execution. (2) Missing required `act-result.txt` generation (task mandate). (3) Fixture files (test_max_age.json, test_keep_latest.json, test_combined.json) referenced but not provided; test_artifact_cleanup.py invoked but not shown. MAJOR: Lines 38–50 (max age), 63–75 (keep latest), 88–102 (combined) duplicate ~15-line test structure—should be factored into composite action or bash helper. Empty input + error handling tests oddly placed in combined-policies job. Grep assertions are fragile; any output format change breaks all tests. Python script is solid (good error handling, clear separation of concerns), but test harness is broken.
